description: Turborepo monorepos (detected via turbo.json at repo root).

plugins.description: Third-party plugin (github.com/pleaseai/claude-code-plugins, plugin path plugins/turborepo, MIT) - single skill triggering on turbo.json, task pipelines, dependsOn, caching, --filter/--affected, CI optimization. POPULARITY CAVEAT: modest adoption (~8 GitHub stars as of this writing) - it's the only dedicated Turborepo Claude Code plugin found, not an established community standard. Free; its skill content covers both local and remote caching - treat any remote-cache guidance it gives as optional/paid-tier (Vercel Remote Cache) and prefer local/self-hosted caching for a genuinely free setup.

_notes: Not a Claude Code plugin, but the most authoritative Turborepo-specific source: Vercel's own official Turborepo Agent Skill (github.com/vercel-labs/agent-skills, skill path skills/turborepo) - installed via `npx skills add vercel/turborepo --skill turborepo --agent claude-code` (the skills.sh ecosystem, not `/plugin install`). Free/open-source, written by Vercel itself. Confirms Vercel has not shipped a full Claude Code marketplace plugin, only this skill - worth using alongside or instead of turborepo@pleaseai.
